name: Churu Cat Treats Chicken With Cheese Recipe 4 Tubes
shortDescription: Churu Cat Lickable Treats Chicken with Cheese 4 tubes of creamy, grain-free puree made with real chicken and cheese. Low-calorie, hydrating, with taurine and vitamin E for healthy, happy cats.
description: Give your cat a creamy, cheesy delight with Churu Chicken with Cheese ! These lickable purée tubes are made with real chicken and cheese , providing irresistible flavor cats will slurp up. With 91% moisture and only 6 calories per tube , these treats support hydration while being a low-calorie, protein-packed snack. Perfect as a treat, food topper, or interactive feeding straight from the tube. Key Benefits: Grain-Free & Delicious: Made with real chicken and cheese—no grains, artificial colors, or preservatives Interactive Feeding: Lick straight from the tube, lap from a bowl, or mix into kibble/wet food Supports Hydration: 91% moisture helps cats stay hydrated and supports urinary health Nutritious & Healthy: Vitamin E and taurine support heart, vision, and immune health Fun & Easy: Tear, squeeze, and feed as a treat, snack, or meal topper Guaranteed Analysis Crude Protein (min): 7.00% Crude Fat (min): 0.20% Crude Fiber (max): 0.30% Moisture (max): 91.00% Vitamin E (min): 310 IU/kg Taurine (min): 0.025% Calorie Content: 430 kcal/kg | 6 kcal per tube (ME) Net Weight: 2.0 oz (0.5 oz × 4 tubes) Feeding Instructions Feed as a treat only. Not intended as a complete meal. Always provide fresh water and consult your veterinarian regularly. Storage Instructions Refrigerate after opening and serve as soon as possible.
